title: Amtech S5518 Window Squeegee, Glass Wiper for Home and Car, Comfortable Grip Handle
features: HOME & CAR USE - The Amtech S5518 window cleaning squeegee is ideal to use on both home and car windows during any time of the year.
HIGH QUALITY BLADE – The high-quality silicone blade offers a handy 30cm width for good all-round coverage, even when used as a bathroom squeegee or shower squeegee.
ERGONOMIC GRIP - This essential piece of window cleaning kit also benefits from a superior and comfortable grip handle, which takes some of the fatigue out of everyday use.
BUSINESS USE - It is also suitable to use as window cleaning equipment for hotels, offices, salons and restaurants, as well as for home cleaning.
description: Product Description The Amtech S5518 window wiper is ideal for both business and domestic use. The ergonomic handle and 30cm silicone blade gives you the width and quality for effective all-round cleaning. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your outdoor living area looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x WINDOW SQUEEGEE See more
